risks.title: A5 must remain blocked until explicit approval
risks.evidence: docs/shadow/open_macro_v03_shadow_pilot_001.md and artifacts/shadow/open_macro_v03_shadow_pilot_001/acceptance_report.json keep A5=blocked and leave technical_and_quantitative_review_recorded pending.
risks.mitigation: PR 7 may create review and preflight decision artifacts only; it must not set A5 unblocked or freeze_ready true.

risks.title: No productive side effects allowed in post-shadow planning or PR 7
risks.evidence: shadow_job_envelope.schema.json and shadow_result_manifest.schema.json pin runtime_activation=false, allow_db_write=false, allow_allocator_publish=false, production_endpoint_activation=none, official_result=false.
risks.mitigation: Keep changes under docs/planning for this branch and under inert artifact/review paths for PR 7.

risks.title: Human technical and quantitative review is still blocking
risks.evidence: acceptance_report.json marks technical_and_quantitative_review_recorded as pending and blocking even after all automated artifact rules pass.
risks.mitigation: PR 7 should produce explicit technical, quantitative, and risk review checklists and a promotion gate matrix.

risks.title: Backend contract mirror is stale relative to workers main
risks.evidence: Workers main contract bundle is sha256:4ff92bba49ccd178348e4646bd4ba0afe45c7d6036a72f00c52bc02c29ea683a; backend mirror read from investintell-light-quant-engine-contracts at source_commit 5ffea2fca17a4ae03258dfcccb7cc34a123d9936 pins sha256:a0770412040a582aebd3cc8e37de532739916cb239833e07fe23ba9cca683277.
risks.mitigation: Keep PR 7 workers-docs/artifact-review only; schedule backend contract sync in a later dedicated PR before any backend/runtime claim.

risks.title: Calibration baseline references remain not certified in the input pack
risks.evidence: calibration baseline_comparison.json lists reference_baselines_not_certified_in_pack and institutional_limits_explicitly_unset as final_approval_blockers.
risks.mitigation: Treat baseline comparison as review evidence, not final A5 proof; document accepted deltas and unresolved reference limitations in PR 7.

risks.title: Railway PR status integration is documented but not proven by this branch
risks.evidence: quant-engine-governance-rollout.md says Railway PR Environments/status integration is pending; .github/workflows is empty on main.
risks.mitigation: Do not claim deploy success without Railway-backed evidence; require Railway CI evidence before future activation.

risks.title: Backend allocator runtime is live and complex
risks.evidence: investintell-light-combo at source_commit a6c6f3e7fae6e2e63a0f3a9214f89c12e0819174 portfolio_builder.py contains regime_aware runtime path with quadrant/gate reads, solver preflight, and post-verification.
risks.mitigation: Exclude backend/control-plane runtime from PR 7; use a later runtime skeleton PR with feature flag default=false if approved.

risks.title: Macro history coverage remains out of scope
risks.evidence: docs/architecture/quant-engine-governance-rollout.md lists macro-history-coverage as deferred runtime follow-up.
risks.mitigation: Keep as a separate runtime-worker PR; do not mix with A5 preflight artifacts.

risks.title: Macro vintage identity remains out of scope
risks.evidence: docs/calibration/open_macro_v03_calibration_001.md and governance rollout list macro-vintage-identity as accepted/deferred debt.
risks.mitigation: Keep productive snapshot identity semantics unchanged until a dedicated runtime-worker PR.

risks.title: Regime gate advisory lock and quadrant staleness debts must not be mixed in
risks.evidence: governance rollout lists advisory lock collision and quadrant runtime staleness/read-model items as deferred runtime follow-ups.
risks.mitigation: Keep SQL/runtime lock/read-model changes out of PR 7.

risks.title: Documentation state names have drift across old docs and current artifacts
risks.evidence: Local-only untracked AGENTS.md contains older A4 wording, while PR #6 docs/artifacts use A4=shadow_pilot_validated.
risks.mitigation: Planning doc should explicitly state that PR #6 artifacts are the post-shadow source for A4 and older docs are historical context.
